message:
feat(browser): add ServiceWorker/SharedWorker detection with not-yet-shipped diagnostics

Audited SOUND: adds runtime context detection for ServiceWorker and
SharedWorker globals, returning clear not-yet-shipped diagnostics with
migration guidance instead of generic unsupported_runtime_context errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
